markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[GrowthX update for SignalFire.](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strong Performance:** $13M+ run rate, on track for $15M EOY. Cashflow positive for two months, a byproduct of disciplined growth, not a primary goal.](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [**Strategic Moat:** GrowthX's "messy middle" approach combines high-touch service with deep AI infra. This solves complex problems (e.g., medical content) that self-serve tools cannot, creating a defensible moat.](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [**Product-Led Evolution:** The long-term vision is a client-operated platform, Atlas, powered by an open-source framework, `output.ai`, launching next month. This will shift the model from service-heavy to product-led.](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
  - [**Pricing as a Filter:** The $15k/month/workstream price is a deliberate filter to manage overwhelming inbound demand, allowing the team to focus on platform development.](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=1952.0)

## Topics

### The "Messy Middle" Strategy

  - [GrowthX occupies a strategic "messy middle" between high-cost consulting and thin AI apps.](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [This approach is a moat, as it solves complex operational problems (e.g., context engineering) that competitors avoid.](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [The current service model funds platform development and provides critical "frontier data" from client projects, which informs the product roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Current Performance & Operations

  - [**Financials:**](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
      - [Run Rate: $13M+ (on track for $15M EOY).](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
      - [Cashflow: Positive for the last two months.](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
      - [Gross Margin: \~70%.](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=1988.0)
  - [**Pricing:** $15,000/month per workstream.](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
      - [Rationale → A deliberate filter to manage overwhelming inbound demand and maintain focus.](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=1952.0)
  - [**Workstream Examples:**](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
      - [Daily blog publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
      - [Vendor page creation (e.g., for Ramp).](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
      - [Newsletter management (e.g., for Udemy).](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=1916.0)
  - [**Client Qualification:** A three-stage process is used to turn down business and ensure focus.](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=1982.0)

### Client Work & Use Cases

  - [**Focus:** 90% B2B, centered on website content (SEO/AEO).](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
      - [Rationale → Websites are the primary transaction hub, and AI search increases the need for high-quality content.](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
  - [**Example: Clerk**](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Used "Deep Researcher" to analyze Clerk's docs, creating a "context artifact" that guides agent evals.](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Example: Lovable**](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
      - [Initial 8-week strategy sprint led to daily content publishing and a new template library.](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
      - [The template library uses a design engineer in the loop to maintain quality while scaling output.](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
  - [**Example: Biological**](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
      - [Delivered content requiring the highest quality bar: review by two doctors, a lawyer, and marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
      - [This project pushed the platform's capabilities, informing all other work.](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)

### Product Roadmap: `output.ai` & Atlas

  - [**`output.ai` (Open Source, Launching Next Month):**](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
      - [A workflow-as-code framework with a runtime layer and native evals.](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
      - [Built to solve internal pain points with existing tools (e.g., Perplexity's broken links).](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
      - [Goal → Enable developers to build agentic workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
  - [**Atlas (Internal Platform):**](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
      - [The proprietary platform currently operated by GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
      - [Long-term vision → Shift to a client-operated model, assisted by a contributor network.](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
  - [**Analogy:** A hybrid of DBT Labs (open-source infra) and Palantir (high-touch service).](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=2101.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marcel:** Send sales/marketing collateral (case studies, etc.) to SignalFire.](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=2234.0)
  - [**Marcel:** Schedule a full sales demo for SignalFire.](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=2234.0)
  - [**Marcel:** Reconnect in late 2025/early 2026, after the `output.ai` launch clarifies the company's positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/ggwZs8UPyLDmiz1qbtC25ze6jtayLULb?tab=summary&timestamp=2318.0)
